research.focus: Weekly performance summary: assessing what worked this week and analyzing engagement to derive key takeaways.
content_opportunities: Success stories and testimonials from current and past students showcasing their improvement and achievements.
Interactive posts or polls asking parents about their children's training needs and preferences to foster community engagement.
research.recommended_action: Create and share a compelling video testimonial from a satisfied parent or student highlighting the benefits of training with Fantasma Football.
research.reasoning: Video testimonials can significantly enhance credibility and trust, resonate with potential clients, and drive engagement on social media platforms, especially given the premium brand image of Fantasma Football.

content.headline: PRESSURE RELIEF PASS
steps: Set up a triangle with two players and a third in the middle.
The middle player receives pressure; practice quick, one-touch passes to escape.
Rotate roles to build awareness and speed under pressure.

options.caption: Feel the weight of the game. Can you break free when it counts? Train harder, play smarter. Book your session — don’t get left behind.
